questions.template: A hydraulic press has piston areas of {a1} m² and {a2} m². If a force of {f1} N is applied to the small piston, what force is exerted at the large piston?
A force of {f} N on an area of {a1} m² creates pressure transmitted to a piston of area {a2} m². What is the force on the larger piston?
In a hydraulic lift, a {f1} N input force on a {a1} cm² piston lifts a load on a {a2} cm² piston. What load can it lift?
A hydraulic system has a small piston of radius {r1} cm and a large piston of radius {r2} cm. If {f1} N is applied to the small piston, what is the output force?
